page_content: AAST233 Asian American Literature and Culture (3 Credits) What is the role of literature in the lives of contemporary Asian Americans? How do Asian American authors imagine identity, violence, and social justice? Consider the role of Asian American literature in forming our understanding of past and present Asian America, and explore Asian American cultures and experiences. Cross-listed with: ENGL233. Credit Only Granted for: ENGL233 or AAST233.
